caption: DRAS-5 state machine with five acuity states, thresholds, and bidirectional transitions (box/arrow primitives routed through pubviz).
DRAS-5 processing pipeline from risk estimation to constrained state update and audit logging (pubviz add_box/arrow).
Missed-escalation rate by trajectory type with seeded bootstrap 95% CI (N=1000); DRAS-5 flat at 0% (structural C1 guarantee) beside the stateless NEWS2/MEWS baselines.
Over-escalation rate with and without C5 with seeded bootstrap 95% CI (N=1000); the two series coincide because C5 grants nothing on this regime.
C5 de-escalation decay behavior supporting constrained risk reduction.
Exponential decay rates by state (S2/S3/S4 half-life comparison).
C5 de-escalation outcome funnel (waterfall): all requests are gated out at the cooling window and 0 are granted under the committed seed-42 model.

Over-escalation locator: share of sample-steps where the system sits above the patient's true acuity level, decomposed by true acuity (S1-S5), showing where the over-escalation rate originates (seed 42).
Per-family risk trajectories (monotonic / oscillating / spike-recover) as a 3x1 small-multiples panel with horizontal acuity bands; replaces the former 3D scatter.
